nodes.title: About 4 Steps LoRA
widgets_values: Using the Wan2.2 Lighting LoRA will result in the loss of video dynamics, but it will reduce the generation time. This template provides two workflows, and you can enable one as needed.

nodes.title: Community defaults
widgets_values: Fun Camera: control trajectory strength 0.6-0.85; fewer steps if VRAM limited.

groups.title: LightX2V 4 Steps LoRA （Can Speed up the workflow but will sacrifice some quality）
